title: App crashes on startup with null pointer
description: The application throws a segfault and crashes immediately when launched. Stack trace shows a null pointer dereference in the init routine. Reproducible on every cold start.

title: Fatal exception when opening large files
description: Opening files over 2GB causes the process to crash with an out-of-memory exception and the whole app dies. The crash log points to an unhandled exception in the file loader.

title: Segmentation fault in image decoder
description: Decoding a malformed PNG triggers a segfault and the renderer crashes hard. The stack trace shows memory corruption deep in the decode loop.

title: Random crashes under heavy concurrency
description: Under many concurrent requests the worker process crashes intermittently with a fatal signal. Looks like a race condition causing a hard crash and core dump.

title: Button misaligned on mobile layout
description: The submit button overlaps the footer on small screens. The CSS layout breaks below 480px and the modal is not centered. Visual styling regression in the UI.

title: Dropdown menu renders off screen
description: The navigation dropdown appears outside the viewport on the right edge. The z-index and positioning of the menu component are wrong, a clear front-end layout bug.

title: Dark mode colors unreadable
description: In dark theme the text color and background have poor contrast and the icons are invisible. The stylesheet does not apply the correct theme tokens to several UI components.

title: Form labels overlap input fields
description: On the settings page the form field labels overlap the text inputs and the spacing is broken. A pure CSS and layout styling problem in the front end.

title: Dashboard takes 30 seconds to load
description: The main dashboard is extremely slow and the page takes far too long to render. Profiling shows an unindexed query and a slow N+1 loop causing the latency. Severe performance regression.

title: API latency spikes under load
description: Response times become very slow when traffic increases. The endpoint throughput drops and p99 latency is terrible. We need to optimize the slow code path for better performance.

title: Memory usage grows until the app is slow
description: Over time the service consumes more and more memory and becomes sluggish and slow to respond. A memory leak is degrading performance and increasing latency.

title: Search query is unbearably slow
description: Full text search takes several seconds per request. The slow query needs an index and caching to improve performance and reduce latency for users.

title: Login fails with valid credentials
description: Users cannot sign in even with the correct password. The authentication token is rejected and the OAuth login flow returns an invalid credentials error. Auth is broken.

title: JWT token expires too early
description: Session tokens expire after a few minutes and force users to log in again. The auth middleware mishandles the token refresh and the login session is lost.

title: Password reset email never arrives
description: The password reset and account recovery flow does not send the verification email. Users are locked out of authentication and cannot regain access to their login.

title: Permission check bypassed for admin routes
description: An authorization bug lets unauthenticated users reach admin endpoints. The auth guard and role permission check are not enforced, a serious login and access control flaw.

title: Database connection pool exhausted
description: The service runs out of database connections under load and queries fail with a pool timeout. The SQL connection pool is leaking and the db becomes unreachable.

title: Migration corrupts the users table
description: A schema migration dropped a column and corrupted rows in the database. The SQL migration script was not transactional and left the db in an inconsistent state.

title: Deadlock on concurrent writes to orders
description: Two transactions writing to the orders table deadlock and the database rolls back. The SQL locking order is inconsistent, causing query failures in the db layer.

title: Query returns stale data after commit
description: After a write the database read returns old rows because of a replication lag. The SQL query hits a stale replica and the db consistency is wrong.

title: Requests time out behind the proxy
description: Calls to the upstream service time out and the connection is refused intermittently. The network socket drops and TCP retries fail behind the load balancer.

title: DNS resolution fails for internal hosts
description: The client cannot resolve internal hostnames and the network request hangs. DNS lookups time out and the connection to the upstream host is never established.

title: TLS handshake errors on the API gateway
description: Clients get connection reset errors during the TLS handshake. The network proxy drops the socket and the HTTP connection fails before any request is sent.

title: Webhook delivery drops packets intermittently
description: Outbound webhooks fail randomly with connection timeout and reset errors. The network path to the remote endpoint is unstable and TCP packets are dropped.
